overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person driving through Night City's downtown district at night. The vehicle navigates wet neon-lit streets, passes under the iconic Kiroshi corporate sign, and stops at intersections amid light traffic and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green and vehicle begins accelerating from stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light on Palm Street then accelerating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: walking along sidewalk near traffic bollards

entered.detail: blue illuminated street sign reading Palm suspended over intersection
tall futuristic glass building with geometric white structural framework
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink graphics
suspended traffic signal showing red then changing to green
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
short black posts with yellow stripes lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light on Palm Street in a futuristic downtown district, surrounded by glass towers and neon billboards. As the light turns green, the car accelerates forward through the intersection, passing yellow crosswalk markings and illuminated bollards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban avenue with overhead walkways and transit bridges

events.description: passing under first overhead bridge structure into more enclosed street canyon
Kiroshi neon sign becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through multiple city blocks under elevated walkways and overpasses

notable_agents.action: vehicle with red taillights driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: elevated transit walkway spanning the street with cyan neon lighting underneath
large digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
large illuminated corporate sign with Japanese text suspended over the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a canyon-like urban corridor with multiple overhead bridges and walkways blocking the sky. Neon lights illuminate the wet road surface as the car approaches the iconic Kiroshi sign visible in the distance, following another vehicle through the covered avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate avenue lined with palm trees under large neon signage

events.description: passing directly under the large Kiroshi neon sign overhead
vehicle changes lanes slightly to the right while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: cruising under the Kiroshi sign and past the corporate headquarters building

notable_agents.action: red sports car directly ahead being followed through the avenue

entered.detail: tall sleek corporate building with glass facade and Kiroshi branding
row of palm trees with cyan neon uplighting along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the massive glowing Kiroshi neon sign that spans the entire avenue, the vehicle passes the corporate headquarters on the left and palm trees illuminated with cyan light on the right. The scene opens slightly as the car continues down the multi-lane road following traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown avenue approaching intersection with commercial signage

events.description: approaching intersection with yellow crosswalk markings visible ahead
vehicle slows to a complete stop for pedestrian crossing the street

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at intersection to allow pedestrian to cross the road

notable_agents.action: person walking across the crosswalk from right to left in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: illuminated corporate sign for Dynalar on distant building facade
yellow zebra crossing stripes marking the pedestrian intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues down the open avenue past the Kiroshi district, approaching a new intersection marked by a Dynalar sign. The car slows and stops at the yellow crosswalk markings to allow a pedestrian to cross from right to left, with other vehicles visible ahead waiting at the traffic signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched downtown district that transitions from a tight urban canyon into a wider corporate avenue. It begins with the vehicle accelerating from a red light on Palm Street, moving past glass towers and illuminated bollards as it enters the intersection. As the car pushes forward, the environment shifts into a claustrophobic corridor of overhead bridges and walkways, where the wet road reflects the glow of a distant Kiroshi sign. The scene then opens up as the vehicle passes directly beneath the massive glowing corporate sign and cyan-lit palm trees, following the flow of traffic down a multi-lane road. Finally, the camera tracks the car as it slows and comes to a halt at a new intersection marked by a Dynalar sign, waiting for a pedestrian to cross the yellow markings.
